name: codex-workflow-skills
description: Guided workflow intake and evidence-based adversarial review skills for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Guided intake and adversarial review loops.
interface.longDescription: Codex Workflow Skills adds two reusable skills: workflow-intake for scoping multi-step work with autonomy gates, and adversarial-review-loop for evidence-based review, finding disposition, and verification handoff.
defaultPrompt: Use $workflow-intake to scope this task before implementation.
Use $adversarial-review-loop to review this plan or diff.
